name: @intentsolutionsio/cli-ux-tester
description: Expert UX evaluator for command-line interfaces, CLIs, terminal tools, shell scripts, and developer APIs

scripts.postinstall: node -e "console.log(\"\\n→ This npm package is a tracking/proof artifact. Install the plugin via:\\n  ccpi install cli-ux-tester\\n  or /plugin install cli-ux-tester@claude-code-plugins-plus in Claude Code\\n\")"
